overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's neon-lit streets. The player moves from a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, through a construction underpass, across a wet plaza, and up to an elevated metro walkway with city views.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing the neon-lit cityscape and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in long brown coat walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure running parallel to the sidewalk
tall buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and digital screens
wide paved pedestrian walkway with panel lines
tall palm tree trunk planted in sidewalk cutout
vehicles moving along the multi-lane street adjacent to sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dusk-lit city sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. Neon billboards illuminate the right side while the concrete overpass looms on the left. The player walks forward, passing a pedestrian in a brown coat, with moderate traffic visible on the street to the right.

events.description: enters dark highway underpass with construction barriers and debris
exits underpass back into dusk light and open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass beneath the highway, navigating around construction barriers and debris

entered.detail: bright green neon sign reading VALENTINOS on the underpass wall
dark concrete ceiling of the highway overpass with exposed beams
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off construction area
scattered trash and overgrown weeds on the asphalt ground

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark, enclosed highway underpass marked by a green VALENTINOS neon sign. Construction barriers line the path through the debris-strewn asphalt. The segment ends as the player exits back into the dusk light, transitioning to an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with metro stairs and traffic intersection

events.description: exits underpass into open plaza with large red metro stairs visible ahead
crosses the wet asphalt street navigating around moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt plaza toward a prominent red staircase structure, avoiding traffic and street obstacles

notable_agents.action: orange sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large structure with bright red stairs leading to elevated metro station
dark reflective pavement with puddles reflecting neon lights
small orange structure at the base of the stairs
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide plaza with wet asphalt reflecting the city lights. The player crosses toward a distinctive red metro staircase structure, navigating around an orange car and other traffic. The elevated highway recedes to the left as futuristic glass towers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station stairwell with neon lighting

events.description: begins ascending the wide red stairs toward the elevated station
reaches top of stairs entering covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide red stairs surrounded by other pedestrians entering the elevated metro station concourse

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red dress walking up stairs just ahead of camera

entered.detail: green metal railings lining both sides of the red staircase
dark metal ceiling with fluorescent panel lights
long red neon tubes running along the upper walkway walls
food stalls and vending machines along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the bright red stairs of the metro station, moving from the open plaza into a covered concourse. Green railings line the stairs as other pedestrians climb alongside. At the top, the scene transitions to an indoor walkway with red neon strips and vending areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city overlook

events.description: pauses at railing to overlook the neon-lit street and traffic below
continues walking along the elevated corridor past other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: pausing at the railing to view the street below, then continuing along the neon-lit elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket leaning on railing looking down at the street

entered.detail: concrete and metal safety railing overlooking the street below
view down to the street level with moving traffic and neon signs
large digital advertisement screens mounted on the left wall
grid of square fluorescent light panels in the walkway ceiling

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated metro concourse, the player pauses at the railing to overlook the bustling neon-lit street below. The walkway is lined with digital ads and red neon strips. Other pedestrians walk by, including a man leaning on the railing enjoying the city view, as traffic moves on the street far below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed city sidewalk into the elevated, neon-lit heights of a metro concourse. It begins beneath a concrete highway overpass at dusk, moving past neon billboards and pedestrians along a busy street. As the camera enters a dark, enclosed underpass marked by a green Valentinos sign and construction debris, the environment tightens before opening back up into a wide, wet plaza that reflects the surrounding city lights. The scene then shifts as the player navigates around traffic toward a red metro staircase, ascending from the open asphalt into a covered station area. Finally, the movement leads onto an elevated walkway lined with red neon strips and digital ads, where the camera pauses at a railing to overlook the bustling traffic and glowing towers of the city below.
